entries.en-US: > This file extends [common/coding-style.md](../common/coding-style.md) with web-specific frontend content.
entries.zh-Hans: > 本文档在 [common/coding-style.md](../common/coding-style.md) 的基础上，扩展了特定于 Web 前端的内容。

entries.en-US: Organize by feature or surface area, not by file type:
entries.zh-Hans: 按功能或界面区域组织，而非按文件类型：

entries.en-US:
```text
src/
├── components/
│   ├── hero/
│   │   ├── Hero.tsx
│   │   ├── HeroVisual.tsx
│   │   └── hero.css
│   ├── scrolly-section/
│   │   ├── ScrollySection.tsx
│   │   ├── StickyVisual.tsx
│   │   └── scrolly.css
│   └── ui/
│       ├── Button.tsx
│       ├── SurfaceCard.tsx
│       └── AnimatedText.tsx
├── hooks/
│   ├── useReducedMotion.ts
│   └── useScrollProgress.ts
├── lib/
│   ├── animation.ts
│   └── color.ts
└── styles/
    ├── tokens.css
    ├── typography.css
    └── global.css
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```text
src/
├── components/
│   ├── hero/
│   │   ├── Hero.tsx
│   │   ├── HeroVisual.tsx
│   │   └── hero.css
│   ├── scrolly-section/
│   │   ├── ScrollySection.tsx
│   │   ├── StickyVisual.tsx
│   │   └── scrolly.css
│   └── ui/
│       ├── Button.tsx
│       ├── SurfaceCard.tsx
│       └── AnimatedText.tsx
├── hooks/
│   ├── useReducedMotion.ts
│   └── useScrollProgress.ts
├── lib/
│   ├── animation.ts
│   └── color.ts
└── styles/
    ├── tokens.css
    ├── typography.css
    └── global.css
```

entries.en-US: Define design tokens as variables. Do not hardcode palette, typography, or spacing repeatedly:
entries.zh-Hans: 将设计令牌定义为变量。不要重复硬编码调色板、排版或间距：
优先使用合成器友好的动画属性：
避免动画化与布局绑定的属性：

entries.en-US: Do not reach for generic wrapper `div` stacks when a semantic element exists.
entries.zh-Hans: 当存在语义化元素时，不要使用通用的包装器 `div` 堆叠。

entries.en-US:
- Components: PascalCase (`ScrollySection`, `SurfaceCard`)
- Hooks: `use` prefix (`useReducedMotion`)
- CSS classes: kebab-case or utility classes
- Animation timelines: camelCase with intent (`heroRevealTl`)
entries.zh-Hans:
* 组件：PascalCase（`ScrollySection`，`SurfaceCard`）
* Hooks：`use` 前缀（`useReducedMotion`）
* CSS 类：kebab-case 或实用工具类
* 动画时间线：具有意图的 camelCase（`heroRevealTl`）
